title: ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
